name: Notion
summary: Warm, illustration-rich minimalism. Navy atmosphere bands, pastel card tints, a single purple CTA, rectangular buttons.
source: Observed from notion.com; values are public-site approximations, not official brand assets.

font.note: Notion Sans is Inter-based; Inter is a close, openly licensed substitute.
font.license: Inter is open source (SIL OFL). Free to bundle.

rules: Reserve the purple accent for one primary CTA per page.
Pair navy atmosphere bands with light sticky-note decoration.
Use pastel card tints for feature cards; keep one tint per card.
